metadata.occupation: Retired Deputy Commissioner, Government of Punjab

content: I was at home on the evening of March 15, 2024, but I was in my bedroom resting after dinner. I did not see anyone enter or leave the house. I only became aware of the theft when my daughter came to me at 9:15 PM and told me the drawer was open and the items were missing. I had not seen Rohan Verma since his termination in September 2023. I had no reason to believe he would return. I am certain the items are his because he knew exactly where the cash was kept — only family and domestic staff knew about the drawer. He was angry about being accused of stealing the phone. I believe he did this for revenge.
